primary_catalyst.description: WSJ published late Friday Jan 30: NVDA's $100B planned investment in OpenAI had stalled, citing insider uncertainty. Huang had told industry associates the investment was 'nonbinding and not finalized,' criticized OpenAI's lack of discipline, and shared concerns about competition from Google/Anthropic. Gap-down Monday open on overnight news.

Huang's own citation of Google/Anthropic competition validates custom silicon concern
Gap-down on WSJ report absorbed over weekend â€” classic positioning-amplified gap
